# Vandetanib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Vandetanib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Vandetanib</strong> 目前有 <strong>22 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Vandetanib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Caprelsa is indicated for the treatment of aggressive and symptomatic medullary thyroid cancer (MTC) in patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic disease. Caprelsa is indicated in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>renal cell carcinoma (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with Xp11.2 translocations/TFE3 gene fusions（99.9%）</li>
<li>unclassified renal cell carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with neuroblastoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>clear cell renal carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>childhood kidney cell carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>renal carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>angiolipoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>familial spontaneous pneumothorax（99.8%）</li>
<li>endocrine-cerebro-osteodysplasia syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>nonpapillary renal cell carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>sarcomatoid renal cell carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>chromophobe renal cell carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>collecting duct carcinoma（99.6%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>acquired cystic disease-associated renal cell carcinoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>cystic renal cell carcinoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>kidney medullary carcinoma（99.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/vandetanib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
